title: Session
description: Session state tracking for Claude Code orchestration, including active work, phase checkpoints, and subagent task tracking

version.description: Semantic version of the session schema format

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last session update

active_work_id.description: Stable id of the selected/current work item. Mirrors active_work.spec_group_id when work is active.

work_items.description: Per-work-item state for concurrent or resumable work. Each key is a work id, usually the spec_group_id.

subagent_dispatches.description: Index of dispatched subagents keyed by task/agent id, including the work_id they belong to.

active_work.description: Currently active work context. Null when no work is in progress.

spec_group_id.description: Reference to the spec group being worked on (sg-<slug>)

current_phase.description: Current phase in the workflow lifecycle

objective.description: Human-readable description of the work objective

manual_test_result.description: Structured /manual-test result for runtime-validation-required specs. Written only by session-checkpoint.mjs.

phase_checkpoint.description: Detailed checkpoint state for the current phase. Null when no work is active.

phase.description: Phase this checkpoint represents (should match active_work.current_phase)

phase_skip_warnings.description: Phase name to skip count mapping for graduated enforcement

enforcement_counter.description: Monotonic counter incremented on every enforcement state mutation via official operations

enforcement_level.description: Enforcement level: off (skip all), warn-only (always warn, never block), graduated (warn first, block on repeat)

override_count.description: Number of overrides used this session (shared cap with reset-enforcement, max 3)

atomic_specs_completed.description: List of atomic spec IDs that have been completed

atomic_specs_pending.description: List of atomic spec IDs still pending implementation

next_actions.description: Ordered list of next concrete actions to take

journal_required.description: Whether a journal entry is required before commit

journal_created.description: Whether the required journal entry has been created

journal_entry_path.description: Path to the created journal entry

subagent_tasks.description: Tracking of subagent task dispatches and completions

completed_this_session.description: Subagent tasks completed in this session

convergence.description: Per-gate convergence state tracking with clean pass counts

clean_pass_count.description: Number of consecutive clean passes recorded for this gate

last_pass_history_index.description: Index into session.history[] of the most recent convergence_pass_recorded entry for this gate. Field is OMITTED (undefined) when no pass has been recorded for this gate yet. Used by the reconcile guard to preserve recent pass evidence.

force_reset_reconcile_skip.description: Per-spec-group skip records written by start-work --force-reset-convergence. Read by reconcileConvergenceFromManifest to short-circuit reconcile after an intentional force reset. Stale entries (mismatched session_id) are cleared lazily on read.

session_id.description: session.session_id at force-reset write time. Used for freshness check (match current session.session_id) vs stale (lazy cleanup).

sequence.description: session.history.length at force-reset write time. Informational provenance marker.

substages_visited.description: Map of phase name -> ordered-by-first-add (deduped) array of challenger sub-stages visited this session. Default canonical location for the ws-dag-substages attribute set; populated by session-checkpoint.mjs transition-phase per contract-substages-visited-schema. Sole writer: transition-phase (R-021 / NFR-19).

convergence_evidence.description: Per-gate evidence arrays recording each convergence pass with structured metadata

passes.description: Ordered array of pass evidence records for this gate

convergence_log_failures.description: Per-gate circuit-breaker state for session.log write failures

consecutive_count.description: Consecutive log-write failures for this gate

last_failure_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent failure, null if never failed

degraded_mode.description: True when consecutive_count has reached the degraded threshold (3)

entered_degraded_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when degraded_mode was entered, null when not degraded

history.description: Historical log of session state changes and significant events

deployment.description: Deployment state tracking. Absent field treated as no deployment detected.

detected.description: Whether deployment activity was detected in this session

target.description: Deployment target identifier (alphanumeric plus . - / : only, max 256 chars)

failed.description: Whether the deployment itself failed. When true, clears all verification requirements.

expected_env_hash.description: SHA-256 (hex, 64 chars lowercase) of canonical-serialized env-var map filtered to deployment_env_allowlist at record-deployment time, per AC-14.1 canonicalization rules. null indicates no env hash captured (pre-first-deploy or no manifest/allowlist).

task_id.description: Unique identifier for this task dispatch

stage.description: Stage identifier for challenger and flow-verifier subagent dispatches

dispatched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when task was dispatched

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when task completed. Null if in flight.

result_summary.description: Brief summary of task result. Null if not yet completed.

pass_evidence_record.description: A structured record of a single convergence pass with verifiable metadata

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the pass was recorded

agent_type.description: The convergence agent type that performed this pass

findings_count.description: Number of findings reported by the agent (null if extraction failed)

findings_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of sorted finding IDs (null if extraction failed)

clean.description: Whether this pass was clean (no findings)

record_source.description: How this record was created: hook (automated SubagentStop -- only source that counts toward clean_pass_count), parse_failed (extractor missed all configured paths -- streak-breaking diagnostic), manual_fallback (EC-7 fail-closed after log-write failure -- streak-breaking). Narrowed by sg-convergence-manual-pass-removal (AC-10): legacy values `manual` and `hook_manual` are no longer written but remain parseable in pre-existing session.json files.

extraction_path.description: Extractor path selected by convergence-pass-recorder.mjs, e.g. structured_block, json_fence, bare_json, success_marker, finding_list, or parse_failed.

parse_failed_reason.description: Parse failure classifier reason when record_source is parse_failed.

auto_decision_batch_id.description: Optional link to the auto-decision engine batch that processed findings

auto_decision_complete.description: Whether the auto-decision batch completed successfully (null if no batch)

history_entry.description: A historical record of a session event
